arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star publicly confirms that transfer decision will come in January
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich has confirmed that his decision over his future will not be dragged out much longer. Since last spring, Kimmich has been in and out of talks with Bayern over a new contract, which expires next summer. Linked frequently to Barcelona and Real Madrid, neither moved for him last summer despite […] The post Bayern Munich star publicly confirms that transfer decision will come in January appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: You can’t replace him one-to-one – Harry Kane could return before end of year
arts.sum: The 31-year-old England captain limped off with what appeared to be a hamstring injury on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Player Rankings: November Edition
arts.sum: Kane left the Borussia Dortmund game with a thigh injury that will hold him out for a few weeks, and it will be interesting to see how Kompany replaces him. Kimmich has played every minute for Bayern this season and does not plan on changing that any time soon.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works S7E19: A Preview of Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen in the DFB-Pokal; How does Bayern replace Harry Kane?; and MORE!
arts.sum: A look at the rosters and injuries for Bayer Leverkusen and Bayern Munich . Can Bayern Munich do it without Harry Kane?

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Jamal Musiala wants better proposal from Bayern Munich; Is Bayern getting closer to deal with Alphonso Davies; Arsenal, Tottenham Hotspur, Chelsea, Liverpool want BVB’s Jamie Gittens; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich desperately wants to extend the contract of Jamal Musiala and now things could finally be breaking in terms of where the player stands on a new deal. Bavarian Podcast Works: Postgame Show — Borussia Dortmund 1-1 Bayern Munich (Bavarian Football Works)

arts.ttl: Max Eberl, Christoph Freund admit Bayern Munich not at their best for first half of 1-1 draw with Dortmund
arts.sum: A 1-1 draw might have been the desired outcome Bayern Munich was hoping for against Borussia Dortmund in the season’s first installment of Der Klassiker, but on the overall balance of play, Jamal Musiala’s late header cancelling out Jamie Gittens’ first half strike was probably the most fair result. Dortmund were the better side in the first half and matters were not made any easier for Bayern when they lost Harry Kane to injury before the halftime break, but their efforts paid off in the end with Musiala sealing a point away from home in a period where they might have been able to score more than once.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer says “focused”, “analytical” Vincent Kompany made difference for Bayern Munich in second half vs. BVB
arts.sum: Bayern Munich was not at its best in the first half of its 1-1 draw with Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker . In the second half, however, the squad was much more up to the task and captain Manuel Neuer attributed part of that performance to the demeanor of head coach Vincent Kompany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen: 2024/25 DFB-Pokal full coverage
arts.sum: In a match that has many German fans salivating, Bayern Munich will host Bayer Leverkusen in a DFB-Pokal showdown that feels like it is happening WAY too early in the competition. Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen already battled to a draw in the Bundesliga, but that does not matter right now.

arts.ttl: “Following the equalizer, Dortmund had little left to offer” — Kimmich sees improvement in Bayern Munich’s play in the second half
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s struggle to get a foothold in the first half of the 1-1 draw against Borussia Dortmund frustrated fans and left the team with a deficit at the break. Dortmund had one more great counter-attacking chance with [Marcel] Sabitzer, but we could have scored the equalizer beforehand.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer: “Generally, [Bayern is] never satisfied with a point against Borussia Dortmund”
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s record against Borussia Dortmund has generally been a very positive one over the years, with Die Schwarzgelben being subjected to some humbling scorelines over the years. Leverkusen are another rival, after all, against which the Bavarians would wish to have a better record against, considering they are now four games without a win against Die Werkself .
